summary: Pipeline framework: declarative multi-step data pipelines with DAG ordering, capability-based pushdown (filter/limit/field-selection to data sources), caching via PipelineStorage, and integration with the relation AST via PipelineStepRelNode. Fluent builder API: PipelineBuilder.step(...).build() -> PipelineSpec -> SimplePipelineRunner.run().
extension_points: StepCapabilities.pushable_params defines what predicates a source can accept
PipelineStorage protocol for custom caching backends
lifecycle_notes: New module 2026-05: full pipeline orchestration with relation integration
documentation_hooks: Pipeline integrates with relations via source() which returns a Relation wrapping PipelineStepRelNode
Pushdown optimisation rewrites filter/fetch/project nodes above PipelineStepRelNode into pushed predicates

tests.detail: ~20 test files covering builder, spec, executor, pushdown, storage, orchestration

risks: Evolving module — API surface may change

evidence.detail: Exports step, PipelineBuilder, source; auto-registers pipeline bridge and optimisations
